item.title: “Supplier ADP Pilot” — CVE Program to Explore Benefits of Supporting VEX-like, Product Status Information in Upstream CVE Records
item.description: “Supplier ADP Pilot” — CVE Program to Explore Benefits of Supporting VEX-like, Product Status Information in Upstream CVE RecordsblogBy CVE Program|March 24, 2026Software is made of other software. When an upstream component has a vulnerability, downstreamproductsthat include or depend on it may not be similarly affected. Variations in implementation, configuration, environment, and operational context can mean different downstream impacts.

item.title: Cribl Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Cribl Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsMarch 24, 2026Cribl, Inc.is now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for vulnerabilities identified in Cribl products, and vulnerabilities discovered by, or reported to, Cribl that are not in another CNA’s scope.

item.title: LAST CHANCE — Virtual and In-Person Registration forCVE/FIRST VulnCon 2026Closes April 6
item.description: LAST CHANCE — Virtual and In-Person Registration forCVE/FIRST VulnCon 2026Closes April 6blogBy CVE Program|March 31, 2026Registration forVulnCon 2026closes on April 6, 2026, at 19:00 UTC.

item.title: The HDF Group Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: The HDF Group Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsMarch 31, 2026The HDF Groupis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for all HDF software including HDF5, HDF4, HSDS, HDFView.

item.title: Fujifilm Business Innovation Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Fujifilm Business Innovation Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsMarch 31, 2026Fujifilm Business Innovation Corp.is now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for Fuji Xerox and FUJIFILM Business Innovation products such as multifunction devices, printers, production printers, software, and cloud services.

item.title: Acer Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Acer Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsMarch 31, 2026Aceris now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for Acer issues only.

item.title: Canva Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Canva Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsMarch 31, 2026Canvais now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for all Canva products, including open-source software published and maintained by Canva, as well as vulnerabilities in third-party software discovered by Canva that are not in another CNA’s scope.

item.title: 500+ Organizations Now Participating as CVE Numbering Authorities (CNAs)
item.description: 500+ Organizations Now Participating as CVE Numbering Authorities (CNAs)blogBy CVE Program|March 31, 2026There are now 502 organizations from around the world participating asCVE Numbering Authorities (CNAs)in the CVE Program:499 CNAsand3 CNAs of Last Resort (CNA-LR).

item.title: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on March 4 Now Available
item.description: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on March 4 Now AvailablenewsApril 7, 2026TheCVE Boardheld a teleconference meeting on March 4, 2026. Read themeeting minutes summary.

item.title: Vulnerability Data Enrichment for CVE Records: 258 CNAs on the Enrichment Recognition List for April 6, 2026
item.description: Vulnerability Data Enrichment for CVE Records: 258 CNAs on the Enrichment Recognition List for April 6, 2026blogBy CVE Program|April 7, 2026
